content: Tauri 2: frontend (webview) calls Rust via #[tauri::command] invoke (async commands return Result). Shared state via app.manage(Mutex<AppState>) accessed as State<'_, Mutex<AppState>>; use tokio Mutex when holding guard across await. Long jobs spawn tokio tasks and push progress to UI via app.emit('event', payload) or Channels; AppHandle.state() reaches state outside commands. Don't wrap in Arc (Tauri does it). Pattern: thin command layer over a pure-Rust core (services/engines) so logic is testable without Tauri.
